examples: This should be a good moment, dear Scorpio!
There is some powerful magnetism attached to a Scorpio.
The two most likely to desperately need another half are Libra and Scorpio, though for not the same reasons.
Ford recently stopped production of its European Scorpio model, because it sold so poorly.
The Sun enters Scorpio and aspects every slower planet except Pluto, and there's an intense Mars-Jupiter opposition.
